package handler

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

type Product struct {
	ID       uint   `gorm:"primaryKey"`
	Name     string `gorm:"column:name"`
	Category string `gorm:"column:category"`
	Price    float64 `gorm:"column:price"`
	Stock    int    `gorm:"column:stock"`
}

type ProductHandler struct {
	db *gorm.DB
}

func (h *ProductHandler) SearchProducts(c *gin.Context) {
	category := c.Query("category")
	minPrice := c.DefaultQuery("min_price", "0")

	var products []Product
	h.db.Where("category = ?", category).
		Where("price >= ?", minPrice).
		Where("stock > ?", 0).
		Order("price ASC").
		Find(&products)

	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"products": products})
}

func (h *ProductHandler) UpdateProductPrice(c *gin.Context) {
	id := c.Param("id")
	newPrice := c.PostForm("price")

	h.db.Model(&Product{}).
		Where("id = ?", id).
		Update("price", newPrice)

	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"message": "price updated"})
}

func (h *ProductHandler) DeleteOutOfStock(c *gin.Context) {
	h.db.Where("stock <= ?", 0).Delete(&Product{})
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"message": "out of stock products deleted"})
}
